copyright.title: Ownership
copyright.rights: All rights reserved. Among Liars is an independent multiplayer social deduction game.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Among Liars collects the following data:
privacy.data_username: Username — chosen by the player, used only in-game
privacy.data_stats: Game statistics — match results, XP (stored in database if logged in, otherwise locally)
privacy.data_cookies: Technical cookies — login session only, no advertising tracking
privacy.no_sale: No data is sold or shared with third parties. Game data can be deleted upon request.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.free: The game is free and accessible to everyone.
terms.behavior: Toxic behavior, cheating or harassment may result in a ban.
terms.fiction: Game content is fictional. Any resemblance to real persons is coincidental.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: Among Liars is an independent project. It is not affiliated with Town of Salem, Mafia, or any other existing social deduction game.
